entry.title: Entry #1160 in Authors Guild v. OpenAI Inc., 1:23-cv-08292
entry.summary: LETTER RESPONSE in Opposition to Motion addressed to Magistrate Judge Ona T. Wang from Joseph C. Gratz, Thomas E. Gorman, Margaret Graham dated May 4, 2026 re: (1517 in 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW) LETTER MOTION to Compel OPENAI to Produce Improper Clawback Document addressed to Magistrate Judge Ona T. Wang from Justin A. Nelson dated April 29, 2026. .
